case_title: SKYLINE REALTY, INC. vs. VUONG, DIANA VAN T. IND&DBA GOLDEN PAGADA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VUONG, DIANA VAN T. IND&DBA GOLDEN PAGADA

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY; CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. JUDGMENT OF MAY-06-1996 SET ASIDE

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
